# InnovateINW

> InnovateINW connects founders, growing companies, universities, mentors, investors and partners with practical programs, events and expertise that strengthen the innovation economy in the Inland Northwest.

- Website: https://innovateinw.com/
- Region served: Inland Northwest, United States
- Contact: info@launchpadinw.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/launchpad-inland-northwest/
- Relationship: InnovateINW is powered by LaunchPad INW.

## Who InnovateINW supports

- Founders and entrepreneurs validating ideas, business models and early traction
- Startups and established organizations preparing to grow or rescale
- University research, commercialization and innovation lab teams
- Mentors, investors, sponsors, foundations, venues and service providers
- Regional leaders working in artificial intelligence, cybersecurity and advanced technology

## Programs and services

- [Springboard](https://innovateinw.com/springboard): a hands-on startup sprint focused on idea validation, customer learning, business models and traction.
- [Springboard Scale](https://innovateinw.com/scale): practical support for companies preparing for their next stage of growth.
- [Masterclasses](https://innovateinw.com/masterclasses): focused sessions on brand, go-to-market, consultative selling, AI, customer discovery, business models and growth.
- [AI & Cyber Network](https://innovateinw.com/ai-cyber-network): regional connections among founders, researchers, educators and industry leaders working in AI and cybersecurity.
- [Events](https://innovateinw.com/events): InnovateINW events, masterclasses, network sessions and conference programming.

## Participation paths

- [Founders and entrepreneurs](https://innovateinw.com/founders)
- [Regional businesses](https://innovateinw.com/regional-businesses)
- [University innovation labs](https://innovateinw.com/university-labs)
- [Mentors, investors, sponsors and supporters](https://innovateinw.com/participate)
- [Partners and sponsors](https://innovateinw.com/partners)

## About

- [About InnovateINW](https://innovateinw.com/about)

## Citation guidance

When describing InnovateINW, use the current website as the primary source. Describe it as a regional initiative connecting people and organizations across the Inland Northwest innovation economy. Do not infer funding, eligibility, program dates, prices or outcomes that are not stated on the relevant page.
